system.damage: talons d8+2 (hand, forceful), beak d8 with disadvantage (hand)
system.moves:
- Cling to rock faces, camouflaged
- Strafe their prey
- Knock prey off a ledge

The full-grown frythancs that hunt the Flats (page 126) are terrors. Their young, thankfully, keep to the mountains. There, they hunt goats and sheep and the occa- sional unwary traveler. The fledglings aren’t nearly as dangerous as their full-grown parents, but still, let’s see how you do when birds with 12-foot wingspans try to tear you off some switchback trail.
